_comment: Bench baseline (TM-8g). Median nanoseconds for the budgeted benches in benches/renderer_perf.rs, captured 2026-04-23 after TMB-021 (row_hashes fast-path). This file feeds scripts/compare-bench-baseline.sh — an *informational* PR diff report only. The hard fail gate is driven by the hard-coded absolute budgets in scripts/check-bench-budget.sh; budgets are deliberately NOT stored here so a baseline-refresh PR cannot accidentally relax the gate. Re-baseline procedure: run benches locally, copy median.point_estimate from target/criterion/<bench>/new/estimates.json into the median_ns fields below, bump captured/captured_machine, and document the rationale in CHANGELOG.md.
captured_machine: developer-laptop (CI runners are noisier; thresholds below tolerate that)

compose_pane_40rows_120x40.note: 40 rows x BufferWrite(120 chars) on 120x40 (Hachikuma composePane shape)

render_frame_identical_120x40.note: RenderFrame identical 120x40 (TMB-021 fast-path: row hashes match -> short-circuit)

render_frame_one_cell_diff_120x40.note: RenderFrame 1-cell diff 120x40 (TMB-021 fast-path: 1 row descended into, 39 rows skipped)
